name: Scareclaw Straddle
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>肆世壊からの天跨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スケアクロー・ストラドル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl_base: Sky Straddle from the Fourth Broken World
desc:
You can activate 1 of the following effects.
● Target 1 "Scareclaw" monster or 1 "Visas Starfrost" in your Monster Zone, and 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; your monster gains ATK/DEF equal to your opponent's monster's ATK or DEF (whichever is higher).
● When a card or effect is activated that targets a "Scareclaw" monster or "Visas Starfrost" you control: Negate that effect.
You can only activate 1 "Scareclaw Straddle" per turn.
eff:

You can only activate 1 "Scareclaw Straddle" per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of Spell Cards
Negates the effects of Trap Cards
